titleStmt.title: SII 15.47: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 47. (B.K. No. 33 of 1928-29.) ARASĪBĪḌI, HUNGUND TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Jaina Basadi.

This is dated the Vikrama year [76], Prajāpati, Pushya ba. 2, Wednesday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti, corresponding to 1151 A.D., December 26, f.d.t. °07. The Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti, however, occurred on the previous day. The Vikrama year evidently means the Chālukya-Vikrama year.

It records that Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Chauṇḍarasa of the Sinda family governing Kisukādu Seventy and other regions (details lost) made a gift at the town of EraMbarage at the request of his queen Dēmaladēvi. The recipients of the gift were Dēvanandi-paṇḍita and Nēmichandra-paṇḍita, who belonged to Mūla-saṁgha, Kuṇḍakund-ānvaya, Dēśiya-gaṇa and Pustaka-gachchha.
The record is very much damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīmatparamagaṁbhīra syādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ jīyāttraiḷōkyanāthasya śāsa
naṁ jinaśāsanaṁ . svastisamasta bhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārā
jādhirājaparamēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷu
kyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyamalladēvavijayarājya mutta
rōttarābhivṛddhi pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire ©
tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśva
raṁ bhōgāvatīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ traividya cūḍāmaṇi gaṁdhagirivajradaṁḍaṁ
siṁdakuḷakamaḷamārttaṁḍaṁ ka manōbhaṁjanaṁ jitaprabhaṁ
janaṁ javaturaṁgamārūḍhaprauḍha vijayalakṣmīkāṁtaṁ madava
darimaṁḍaḷika mardanaika kaṭhōrakaṁṭhīravaṁ raṇaraṁga śū
raṁ daśavadanavijayōddāmarāmaṁ bhujabaḷabhīmaṁ sā
hasōttu śvara vīracauṁḍarasaru kisukā
ḍeppattu mūnūṟumaṁ duṣṭani
graha vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttire
tadarddhāṁgarājya bhyudaya sahasraphaḷa
bhōgabhāgini dvitīyalakṣmīsamāneya yāneyaruṁ pratyakṣa
pārvvatiyaruṁ patibratāruṁdhatiyaruṁ śiṣṭēṣṭajanakalpavṛkṣeyaru
mabhinavasarasvatiyaruṁ śrīmatpiriyarasiyaru paṭṭamahādēvi
yaru dēmaladēviyaru śrīmaccauṁḍarasadēvargge binnapaṁgeyduvī
vikramavarṣada 76 neya prajāpati saṁvatsarada sauṣyabahuḷa 2 neya bu
dhavāradute rāyaṇa saṁkrāṁti nimittameraṁbarage paṭṭaṇadoḷ śrī mū
lasaṁghada kuṁḍakuṁdānvayada dēśiyagaṇada pustakagacchada śrīkaradēva
bhaṭṭārakara śiṣyarmmūlanaṁdisaiddhāntadēvara śiṣyarddēvanaṁdipaṁḍitaruṁ guṇa
caṁdrasaiddhāntadēvara śiṣyarnnayakīrttisaiddhāntadēvaravara śiṣyar
śrīmannēmicaṁdrapaṁḍitadēvargge manneya biṭṭarasa sahitaṁ vikramapu
ra
Digital edition of SII 15.47 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
